blockers.message: MMAudioBackend is an intentional raising stub from the audit-only build; real MMAudio trajectory access (extract x_s, resume, decode, v_theta) and the s<->t direction / velocity->score sign must be implemented and audited against MMAudio source (Phase 0.1/0.2) before diag_phase0_feasibility can run.
blockers.safe_next_command: Decide MMAudio wiring path (see STOP-C note); the wiring itself is GPU-free but needs MMAudio source available.

blockers.message: Both formal diagnostics are owner=human and require a GPU run with MMAudio + torch + FoleyBench. This is a login node with no GPU/torch/MMAudio. CLAUDE.md forbids GPU jobs without explicit user approval.
blockers.safe_next_command: Explicit user approval to deploy diag_phase0_feasibility to an17/an22, plus environment setup.

next_action: human decision: authorize the MMAudio-wiring + GPU Phase-0 path, or defer
